domains.name: Governance & Oversight
domains.description: Organizational structures, roles, policies, and board-level accountability for AI systems.

domains.name: Risk Management
domains.description: Identification, assessment, and mitigation of AI-specific risks throughout the system lifecycle.

domains.name: Data Governance
domains.description: Data quality, provenance, bias detection, privacy, and lifecycle management for AI training and operation.

domains.name: Model Lifecycle
domains.description: Development, testing, validation, deployment, monitoring, and retirement of AI models.

domains.name: Transparency & Explainability
domains.description: Disclosure of AI use, model documentation, explainability of decisions, and algorithmic transparency.

domains.name: Human Oversight
domains.description: Human-in-the-loop, human-on-the-loop, and human-in-command mechanisms for AI systems.

domains.name: Fairness & Non-Discrimination
domains.description: Prevention of algorithmic bias, equitable treatment, and impact assessment across protected groups.

domains.name: Security & Resilience
domains.description: Cybersecurity, adversarial robustness, system integrity, and resilience of AI systems.

domains.name: Accountability & Audit
domains.description: Audit trails, compliance verification, third-party assessments, and accountability mechanisms.

domains.name: Incident & Monitoring
domains.description: Continuous monitoring, incident detection, reporting, response, and post-market surveillance.

domains.name: Rights & Societal Impact
domains.description: Fundamental rights protection, societal well-being, environmental impact, and stakeholder engagement.
